events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from CPMC Van Ness for client 1015. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: cardiovascular, diabetic, renal. Allergies: soy, peanut. Sodium ceiling 500 mg/meal, carbs 40–55 g/meal. Prefers Vietnamese; dislikes cilantro. Cooking ability: full. 10 meals/week, zone Excelsior.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Fresh Spring Rolls with Chicken
Rejected: Tofu and Vegetable Curry with Rice
Matched: Steamed Rice Rolls with Mushrooms
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 423/500 mg ✓, carbs 46 g (target 40–55) ✓, no soy/peanut ✓.

events.title: Matched: Overnight Oats with Berries
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 300/500 mg ✓, carbs 55 g (target 40–55) ✓, no soy/peanut ✓.

events.title: Matched: Baked Cod with Herbed Couscous
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 351/500 mg ✓, carbs 41 g (target 40–55) ✓, no soy/peanut ✓.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1015 added to route R-EXCE-1 (Excelsior), delivery 2026-07-21, window 14:00–16:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1015: 10 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
